title: Elite 4 — Unova
warning: ⚠️ The Elite 4 only works 100% from the 5th time you beat this same Elite 4. Before that, the opponent's teams may be different (and often will be) — so the guide may not match.
lead: Choose the champion and the Pokémon the opponent led with. Follow the steps.
